title: Panel: Agents Under the Hood: Building the Agentic Stack | Agentic Zero
description:
– Moderator: Chris Wessels, The Graph Council and founder of GraphOps and Summerstone
– Nicoás Montone. Software Engineer at Vercel (v0)
– Clemens Wan. Head of marketing and AI at DIN
– Juan Irungaray. Google Developer Expert.
– Nader Dabit. Dir. of Developer Relations ar Eigen Labs

A key part of evolving agentic systems is the agentic stack. We discussed: environment (serverless), context/memory, actions (tools/MCP), emerging standards (A2A, X402, ERC8004). EigenCompute, DIDs, and AI gateways.
